name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE New Kelly Bag
CE 24 New Kelly Bag, small size big capacity, classic monogram colorway and the white monogram super suitable for summer. Logo print, cowhide trim, fabric lining, drawstring leather strap, 1 main compartment, adjustable shoulder strap, fits umbrella, phone, power bank 👯‍♀️
Style No.: 10M742
Color: Beige/Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 13.5x17.5x11cm
